prompt_text: Open source or affordable ATS tools instead of Greenhouse
response:
# Open Source & Affordable ATS Alternatives to Greenhouse

## Open Source Options

**Odoo Recruitment**
- Part of broader ERP suite
- Free & self-hosted
- Good for small teams
- Limited specialization

**OpenCATS**
- Dedicated open-source ATS
- Self-hosted only
- Basic features (job posting, resume parsing, pipeline tracking)
- Older codebase, smaller community

**Recruiterbox** (freemium tier)
- Limited free version
- ~$99-299/month paid plans
- Good balance of features & affordability

## Affordable SaaS Options

**Lever**
- $99-299/month (per job opening pricing)
- Strong candidate experience
- Good API for integrations
- More transparent pricing than Greenhouse

**JazzHR**
- $99-299/month
- User-friendly interface
- Suitable for 1-500 employees
- Often 30-50% cheaper than Greenhouse

**Workable**
- $99-399/month
- Solid for small-to-mid companies
- Good compliance features
- Better pricing transparency

**Breezy HR**
- $99-199/month
- Simple, clean interface
- Good for startups
- API access even on lower tiers

**Ashby**
- $500-1500/month team plan
- Modern, developer-friendly
- Best for growth-stage startups
- Steep learning curve

## Cost Comparison
| Tool | Starting Price | Best For |
|------|---|---|
| Workable | $99/mo | SMBs |
| JazzHR | $99/mo | Budget-conscious |
| Lever | $99/mo | User experience |
| Ashby | $500/team/mo | Growth startups |
| Odoo | Free | Ultra-budget |

**Recommendation:** If budget is primary concern → **JazzHR**. For open source → **Odoo** if you need full ERP features.
